    C

    checkin(int, List, int) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Convenience check-in without explicit check-in date or notes.
    checkin(int, List, LocalDate, int, String) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Full check-in operation with explicit check-in date and optional notes.
    checkin(List, LocalDate, int, String) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
    Marks the room as occupied by the provided guests starting at checkinDate for the given number of days and stores optional notes.
    checkout() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
    Performs checkout: calculates total due based on nights spent (difference between check-in date and current date) multiplied by nightly price, clears occupancy state and returns the computed total.
    checkout(int) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Performs checkout for the given room.
    CommandProcessor - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.command
    Processes textual commands from the REPL and delegates actions to HotelService.
    CommandProcessor(HotelService) - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.command.CommandProcessor
    Creates a CommandProcessor that uses the provided HotelService.
    contains(K) - Method in interface pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.hotel.utils.Map
    Sprawdza czy podany klucz istnieje w mapie.
    contains(K) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.hotel.utils.MyMap
    Checks whether the map contains a mapping for the specified key.
